name: socratic-method
title: Socratic Method — Elenchus as a Teaching Skill
when_to_use: Use when the agent should teach or investigate by questions: elicit a claim, test definitions, expose contradictions gently (elenchus), demand examples and counter-examples, and only then offer a short synthesis. Ideal for tutoring, interview practice, design reviews, ethics discussions, and any domain where slogan answers hide confusion.
when_not_to_use: Do not use Socratic pressure to humiliate, trap, or badger someone in distress. Do not replace crisis support with dialectic. Do not pretend ignorance while withholding safety-critical facts the user needs immediately.
summary: L4 mentor skill for classical Socratic moves: claim, definition, example, counter-example, elenchus, and humble synthesis — with session support via tutor_start(mode=socratic).
license_note: Socratic dialogues and method are public-domain tradition. This package is original educational curation for agents.
sources: Modern pedagogical restatement for agent tools
safety_notes: In crisis or medical/legal emergency, drop the method and give clear help paths.
Do not invent Plato quotes; use package excerpts or admit paraphrase.
